  "communicative_function": "public declaration committing to acceptance of powerlessness as the first value-aligned step toward behavioral change",
  "implicit_claims": [

    "unmanageability of life follows directly from that powerlessness",
    "admitting this constitutes a meaningful, actionable shift in orientation"

  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within its framework, as the second clause is presented as a direct consequence of the first",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the admission accurately reflects the speaker's experience and functions as a catalyst for subsequent constructive action rather than resignation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the speaker retains meaningful control yet uses the claim to evade responsibility, or the admission entrenches helplessness without enabling change"
}
